caption: sg meeting ran almost two hours tonight. amara and i are still debating the budget amendment on the walk back lol
two hours?? what was the hold up
the usual — everyone has an opinion until it's time to vote. we got through it tho. proposal passes next session if nothing changes
at least amara's got your back in there. you eating or did you skip again
grabbed something from the dining hall before it closed. don't start lol
i'm not saying anything 👀 you done for the night or you got more reading
polisci response due thursday so not really done. probably at bird library til 11
ok text me when you're heading back. it's cold out tonight
